issues.type: hard-coded fontSize / R5 violation
issues.current: _numBlock label uses FacingTokens.micro.copyWith(fontWeight, letterSpacing) BUT SESSIONS/STREAK are numeric-metric labels — should use sectionLabel token for group header or confirm token is correct. Also: _kv SizedBox(width: 110) hard-codes layout width without token.
issues.should_be: Width constant should reference a spacing token or named constant; confirm SESSIONS/STREAK label token is micro (OK) vs sectionLabel

issues.type: boxShadow on DayCell — not in this file; here: multiple box-shadow absent but check _MemberDetailSheet container uses surfaceOverlay border — OK. ACTUAL P0: _coachNoteFlow uses `const SnackBar(content: Text('이전 WOD 복제. 필요 시 수정 후 Post.'))` — Korean text in a SnackBar: 이 패턴은 V8 위반 아님 (2줄+ 한글 허용). Re-scan: line 79 AppBar title 'COACH DASHBOARD' OK. Real P0: line 55 SnackBar content Text '처리 실패' — bare Korean fallback OK. RECHECK: attendance_screen _DayCell line 734–739 boxShadow with blurRadius 6 — that is in attendance_screen NOT this file. In THIS file: no gradient / no multi-boxShadow. Downgrade. Actual distinct P0 for THIS file: sectionLabel used as section header inline in _WodCard (different file). In coach_dashboard: line 300 _numBlock uses FacingTokens.micro.copyWith with custom letterSpacing 1.2 — sectionLabel should be used for section grouping headers ONLY; SESSIONS/STREAK are data sub-labels so micro is correct. Genuine P0: line 300–302 letterSpacing 1.2 inline on micro — token already defines letterSpacing for micro (ls+0.4 per spec). Overriding letterSpacing in copyWith = R5 violation (custom non-token value).
issues.should_be: Remove letterSpacing override; use FacingTokens.micro directly (token already carries ls+0.4). If 1.2 is needed, add a named variant to FacingTokens.
issues.rule_ref: R5 — 토큰 외 인라인 letterSpacing 금지

common_patterns: R5: micro.copyWith(letterSpacing: 1.2/1.0/0.8/0.6) — inline non-token letterSpacing 전 파일 공통 (13개 이상 사례)
V8: InputDecoration labelText에 Korean 또는 Korean parenthetical (선택/optional) 혼입 — wod_post, group_management, announcements, compose_note 4파일
V9: 한 문장 내 영문 기술 용어 + 한글 조사/동사 혼합 — box_wod SnackBar, leaderboard caption, attendance streakNote, messages 등
R1: AppBar title 존재 시 body 내 h3 headline 중복 — box_wod _WodList, leaderboard 2파일
R3: sectionLabel 토큰에 한글 텍스트 혼입 (wod_post '선택' 패턴) 또는 비-섹션 용도 오용 (attendance _DayCell ×N label)
P0 박스섀도: attendance _DayCell boxShadow — §2 절대 차단 위반
CoachBadge AppBar: wod_post_screen 코치 전용 화면에 CoachBadgeAction 누락
